headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Underperform on Camden Prop Trust, Raises Price Target to $102
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Camden Prop Trust (NYSE:CPT) with a Sector Underperform and raises the price target from $95 to $102.
